data.title: China Galaxy Securities Unveils New Board Nominations
data.description:
China Galaxy Securities Co (HK:6881) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

China Galaxy Securities Co. has announced the nomination of new directors for its fifth board session, including Mr. Wang Sheng and Mr. Xue Jun as executive directors, alongside several candidates for non-executive and independent non-executive positions. The nominations are set to be reviewed at the upcoming shareholders’ general meeting. data.title: SoftOx Solutions Announces Shareholder Dividend Plan
data.description:
SoftOx Solutions AS (DE:6FV) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

SoftOx Solutions AS has announced a planned in-kind dividend distribution of shares from its subsidiary, SoftOx Wound & Skin Care, on a 1:1 basis. This means each company share will be entitled to one share of the subsidiary, with a valuation of NOK 0.00512 per share. This dividend is contingent upon approval at the upcoming shareholder meeting in December 2024.

For further insights into DE:6FV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ondas Holdings Partners with Siemens for Rail Network Upgrade
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Ondas Holdings ( (ONDS) ) has issued an announcement.

Siemens Mobility and Ondas Networks are collaborating to enhance Chicago’s Metra rail network by upgrading its 900 MHz communications system with cutting-edge Airlink wireless technology. This upgrade aims to boost network capacity, security, and reliability, setting a precedent for future rail communication systems across North America, and promising improved connectivity and efficiency for commuters in the bustling urban environment of Chicago.

For an in-depth examination of ONDS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Noah Holdings Private Wealth and Asset Management Limited recently repurchased 100,000 ordinary shares, equivalent to 20,000 ADSs, on the New York Stock Exchange. data.title: Sendas Distribuidora Announces R$800 Million Debenture Issuance
data.description:
Sendas Distribuidora (ASAI) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Sendas Distribuidora S.A. has announced the approval of its 12th issuance of unsecured debentures, valued at R$800 million. These debentures, part of a public distribution offering registered with the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission, will be used for general corporate purposes including liability management. The issuance represents a strategic financial move by the company to reinforce its cash position.

Marks and Spencer Group has announced that key figures within the company have been granted options to purchase shares under its Sharesave scheme. data.title: Ocean Sun’s Floating Solar Project Shows Resilience Amid Typhoon
data.description:
Ocean Sun AS (DE:OW7) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Ocean Sun AS’s Magat Floating Solar pilot project in the Philippines, despite sustaining structural damage from Typhoon Nika, has demonstrated strong resilience and design improvements over its five-year operation. The recent incident has provided valuable insights for future enhancements, with Ocean Sun expressing confidence in their technology and plans for ongoing collaboration with SN Aboitiz Power.
